---
name: Threat Report
about: Report a new adversarial failure mode or exploit surface
title: '[THREAT] '
labels: threat, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Threat description
<!-- What is the mechanism? How does a bad actor exploit this? -->

## Affected section / clause
<!-- Which article, founding-order rule, annex, patch, threat, claim, or pilot gate does this affect? -->

## Attacker profile
<!-- Who can execute this? Wealthy individual, family office, bank, vendor, public agency, hostile successor government, captured court, oracle node, ordinary fraud ring, etc. -->

## Attack path
<!-- Step-by-step path from starting conditions to successful exploit -->

## Impact assessment
<!-- What happens if this exploit succeeds? Who is harmed? -->

## Detection difficulty
<!-- How easy is this to see in real time? 1 = obvious, 5 = invisible. Explain why. -->

## Risk estimate
<!-- Optional: Impact 1-5 x Likelihood 1-5 x (6 - Detectability 1-5), following the threat register method. -->

## Proposed mitigation direction
<!-- Not required, but helpful. What would close this gap? -->

## Real-world parallel
<!-- Is there a comparable case in existing systems? -->

## Residual risk
<!-- What would still remain unsolved even after the proposed mitigation? -->
